_comment: Per-path skill assessment configuration. For each (current_role → target_role), defines transfer/assess/skip tiers with reasons and default levels. v1: four-tier migration model (direct_transfer / adjacent_transfer / core_gap / skip).

transfer.reason_zh: 前端核心语言，TypeScript 工程化能力可直接迁移到 AI 应用的后端与工具链开发
transfer.reason_en: Core frontend language — TypeScript engineering transfers directly to AI app backend & tooling

transfer.reason_zh: 前端日常与后端联调，接口契约意识可迁移到 AI 服务的 API 设计
transfer.reason_en: Daily frontend-backend collaboration — API contract thinking transfers to AI service design

transfer.reason_zh: 前端 SSE / WebSocket 经验直接适用于 LLM 流式输出的前端集成
transfer.reason_en: Frontend SSE/WebSocket experience directly applicable to LLM streaming integration

transfer.reason_zh: 前端有 try-catch 和错误边界经验，但缺少后端级别的重试、幂等策略
transfer.reason_en: Frontend try-catch & error boundary experience, but lacks backend-grade retry & idempotency patterns

transfer.reason_zh: 前端有 CI/CD 和构建部署概念，但容器化和后端部署经验通常不深
transfer.reason_en: Frontend CI/CD & build/deploy concepts, but container & backend deployment experience is usually shallow

transfer.reason_zh: 后端日常核心能力，接口设计、契约和错误处理可直接用于 AI 服务开发
transfer.reason_en: Backend core skill — API design, contracts & error handling transfer directly to AI services

transfer.reason_zh: 后端系统级的错误处理、重试和幂等策略可直接迁移
transfer.reason_en: Backend-grade error handling, retries & idempotency transfer directly

transfer.reason_zh: 后端容器化部署和 CI/CD 经验可直接复用
transfer.reason_en: Backend container deployment & CI/CD experience directly reusable

transfer.reason_zh: 后端日志、指标和链路追踪经验可直接用于 AI 系统的可观测性
transfer.reason_en: Backend logging, metrics & tracing experience directly applicable to AI system observability

transfer.reason_zh: 鉴权经验有帮助但不是 AI 应用开发的核心门槛
transfer.reason_en: Auth experience helps but isn't a core AI application development threshold

transfer.reason_zh: 全栈日常核心，前后端接口设计经验可直接用于 AI 服务架构
transfer.reason_en: Full-stack core — end-to-end API design experience transfers directly to AI service architecture

transfer.reason_zh: 全栈核心语言，TypeScript 工程化能力横跨前后端
transfer.reason_en: Full-stack core language — TypeScript engineering spans frontend and backend

transfer.reason_zh: 全栈经验覆盖前后端错误处理，有系统级思维
transfer.reason_en: Full-stack experience covers frontend & backend error handling with system-level thinking

transfer.reason_zh: 全栈通常负责端到端部署，经验可直接复用
transfer.reason_en: Full-stack typically owns end-to-end deployment — directly reusable

transfer.reason_zh: 全栈的实时通信经验（SSE/WebSocket）可直接迁移到 LLM 流式集成
transfer.reason_en: Full-stack real-time communication (SSE/WebSocket) directly transfers to LLM streaming

transfer.reason_zh: 鉴权经验有帮助但不是 AI 应用开发的核心门槛
transfer.reason_en: Auth experience helps but isn't a core AI application development threshold
